description.en: Create a vending machine to sell multiple NFTs at a fixed price. Buyers can mint NFTs directly from your machine.
description.de: Einen Verkaufsautomaten erstellen, um mehrere NFTs zu einem Festpreis zu verkaufen. Käufer können NFTs direkt aus deinem Automaten prägen.
description.es: Create a vending machine to sell multiple NFTs at a fixed price. Buyers can mint NFTs directly from your machine.
description.fr: Create a vending machine to sell multiple NFTs at a fixed price. Buyers can mint NFTs directly from your machine.
description.ro: Create a vending machine to sell multiple NFTs at a fixed price. Buyers can mint NFTs directly from your machine.
description.it: Create a vending machine to sell multiple NFTs at a fixed price. Buyers can mint NFTs directly from your machine.

description.en: Price per NFT in the accepted payment token.
description.de: Preis pro NFT in dem akzeptierten Zahlungstoken.
description.es: Price per NFT in the accepted payment token.
description.fr: Price per NFT in the accepted payment token.
description.ro: Price per NFT in the accepted payment token.
description.it: Price per NFT in the accepted payment token.

description.en: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
description.de: Akzeptiertes Zahlungstoken (EGLD für eGold oder ESDT-Token-Kennung).
description.es: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
description.fr: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
description.ro: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
description.it: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).

description.en: Name of the vending machine (encoded as bytes).
description.es: Name of the vending machine (encoded as bytes).
description.fr: Name of the vending machine (encoded as bytes).
description.ro: Name of the vending machine (encoded as bytes).
description.it: Name of the vending machine (encoded as bytes).

description.en: NFTs to add to the vending machine.
description.de: NFTs, die zum Verkaufsautomaten hinzugefügt werden sollen.
description.es: NFTs to add to the vending machine.
description.fr: NFTs to add to the vending machine.
description.ro: NFTs to add to the vending machine.
description.it: NFTs to add to the vending machine.
